1.description: State banking deregulation over time. This figure plots the annual average value of the banking deregulation index Dereg across states during our sample period (1977 to 1993).Deregis equal to the sum ofIntrastate_DeregandInterstate_Dereg, which are indicators equal to one if the state has passed intrastate and interstate banking deregulation, respectively. Panel A plots the average value ofDeregeach year (across states). Panel B separately plots the average values ofInter_DeregandIntra_Deregeach year. See Section I.A for more details.

2.description: Bank lending effects over time. This figure plots the dynamics of the effects in TableV. The panels plot results analogous to those in TableVwith effects that are estimated separately for different years (1977, 1982, and 1987). For each specification in TableV, the variablePreis replaced with separate indictors for the three years (Year_1977,Year_1982, andYear_1987). All variables are constructed in a similar way to Table V using these indicators. The results in Panel A are based on the specification used in Panel B of TableV(column (1)). The values reported for yearirepresent the coefficient onYear_i×IDereg×TFP×Young. The results in Panel B are based on the specification used in Panel A of TableV(columns (1) and (2)). The values reported for yearirepresent the coefficient onYear_i×IDereg×TFPfor the respective age group (Young or Old). All reported effects are scaled in the same way as in TableVto capture the gap between the top and bottom quartiles of an industry-state.
